hero.homeDesc: Experience secure, seamless banking with modern tools.
hero.careersDesc: Join a mission-driven team building digital banking products.
hero.aboutDesc: YourBank is built on trust, transparency, and speed.
hero.securityDesc: Encryption, strong authentication, and monitoring protect your account.

features.homeDesc: Clear visibility and confidence across accounts, payments, and protection.
features.f1d: Manage balances, transfers, and alerts from a clear, responsive dashboard.
features.f2d: Extra verification for sign-in and sensitive actions to reduce account takeover risk.
features.f3d: Continuous monitoring helps flag unusual activity so you can act quickly.
features.f4d: Download statements and tax forms when you need them, securely in one place.
features.careersDesc: Impact, collaboration, and customer-centric innovation in every team.
features.cv1d: We do the right thing and own outcomes across teams and products.
features.cv2d: Every role contributes to better outcomes and long-term trust.
features.cv3d: Cross-functional teams solve hard problems with shared ownership.
features.cv4d: We continuously improve how banking should feel and perform.
features.aboutDesc: Democratize better financial tools while keeping security and usability first.
features.m1d: Give people frictionless access to products that improve everyday finances.
features.m2d: Become a trusted digital-first banking partner for households and businesses.
features.securityDesc: Controls that are proactive, transparent, and easy to understand.
features.s1d: Hardened architecture and secure session handling for online banking.
features.s2d: Extra layers for sign-in and high-risk actions.
features.s3d: Detection systems help stop suspicious behavior quickly.
features.s4d: Consistent protection across web and mobile experiences.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.desc: Answers about access, security, and our digital banking experience.
faq.q1: How do I open an account with YourBank?
faq.a1: Click Sign Up, complete your details, and verify your account to start using online tools.
faq.q2: What documents do I need to apply for a loan?
faq.a2: You normally need identity proof, income proof, and supporting financial documents.
faq.q3: How can I access my account online?
faq.a3: Use your registered email and password, then enable two-factor authentication where available.
faq.q4: Are my transactions and personal data secure?
faq.a4: Traffic is encrypted with modern security controls and continuous fraud monitoring.

calc.title: Compound interest calculator
calc.subtitle: Estimate future balance and interest. Adjust principal, rate, time horizon, and frequency.
calc.currencyHint: Principal and results use the selected currency. When you change currency, the amount converts using market rates vs USD.
calc.ratesLive: Live rates vs USD. Last update: {{date}}
calc.ratesFallback: Using approximate offline rates (demo). Connect to the internet for live rates.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to access your dashboard and tools.
auth.signupSubtitle: Create an account to use the dashboard and financial tools.
auth.errLogin: Sign-in failed. Please check your email and password.
auth.errGoogle: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.errPassLen: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.errSignup: Registration failed. This email may already be in use.

dashboard.title: Account overview
dashboard.subtitle: Signed-in profile and quick account details.
dashboard.n1: YourBank is a demo interface for learning. It is not a chartered bank and does not offer FDIC insurance.
dashboard.n2: Never share your password or one-time codes with anyone, including anyone claiming to be support.
dashboard.e1d: Use a strong unique password, enable two-factor authentication where available, and review recent sign-in activity regularly.
dashboard.e2d: Help center and live chat (demo): Mon–Fri, 8:00 a.m.–8:00 p.m. ET. Emergency card lock: available 24/7 in the mobile app.
dashboard.e3d: Read our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service. Equal opportunity lender notice applies where required.

account.title: Account settings
account.subtitle: Manage how you sign in and view identifiers linked to your profile.
account.hint: To change your password or linked providers, use your email provider or Firebase account tools (demo).

settings.title: Settings
settings.intro: Choose a section below to view or change preferences.
settings.languageHelp: Switching language updates all text across the site.
settings.accountHelp: Read-only details from your sign-in provider.
settings.appHelp: YourBank demo — for learning React, routing, and Firebase Authentication.

legal.privacyP1: This demo explains how we would handle personal information in a real banking product. Data you enter may be processed by Firebase Authentication according to your project settings.
legal.privacyP2: We collect identifiers needed to sign you in and use encryption for data in transit. We do not sell your personal information.
legal.termsP1: By using this demo you agree to use it only for educational purposes. YourBank (demo) is not a real financial institution.
legal.termsP2: You are responsible for your login credentials. We may update these terms; continued use means acceptance.
